{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mortal Edict
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mortal [[Edict]] is a powerful entity characterized by the magic of death, representing the unavoidable and certain end of all things. She serves as a force against stagnation and aims to bring an end to those who are immortal. Her power is immense, far exceeding the capabilities of weaponry like the [[Zenith Cannon]], which was modeled after her own abilities. In combat, she can manifest in a star form featuring a multicolored or rainbow-colored sun. While she has demonstrated intense aggression and a desire to fight, she has also shown moments of fascination with technology and can be influenced by the presence of others.}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mortal Edict]] is something for which someone qualified must be found.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mortal Edict]] is sitting on [[Sola]]'s lap.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mortal Edict]]'s form is a rainbow star.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mortal Edict]] is a weapon with immense capability.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] has lost his [[Mortal Edict]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
